entry.title: Bill 91 (Hawaiʻi County): — → Passed Second Reading
entry.content:
AMENDS ORDINANCE NO. 25-46, AS AMENDED, RELATING TO PUBLIC IMPROVEMENTS AND FINANCING THEREOF FOR THE FISCAL YEAR JULY 1, 2025, TO JUNE 30, 2026

Adds the Public Works Kahakai Boulevard Safe Routes to School - Keonepoko Project ($530,000) and the Kakakai Boulevard Safe Routes to School – Keonepoko – Federal Project ($2,100,000) to the Capital Budget. Funds for these projects shall be provided from General Obligation Bonds, Capital Projects Fund – Fund Balance and/or other Sources ($530,000) and Federal Grants Receivable ($2,100,000).

Status: — → Passed Second Reading

Latest action: Council: Bill 91 passes second & final reading - 11/5/2025

View on the council site

entry.title: New: Bill 91 (Hawaiʻi County) — On agenda 2025-11-05
entry.content:
AMENDS ORDINANCE NO. 25-46, AS AMENDED, RELATING TO PUBLIC IMPROVEMENTS AND FINANCING THEREOF FOR THE FISCAL YEAR JULY 1, 2025, TO JUNE 30, 2026

Adds the Public Works Kahakai Boulevard Safe Routes to School - Keonepoko Project ($530,000) and the Kakakai Boulevard Safe Routes to School – Keonepoko – Federal Project ($2,100,000) to the Capital Budget. Funds for these projects shall be provided from General Obligation Bonds, Capital Projects Fund – Fund Balance and/or other Sources ($530,000) and Federal Grants Receivable ($2,100,000).

Latest action: On agenda 2025-11-05
